mapper.select:
SELECT prdt.UTLINSTT_ID ,prdt.FUND_ID ,prdt.FUND_NM ,prdt.FUND_PTRN ,prdt.ORGZ_TRGPFT ,prdt.AUDIT_STG ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.WODY) as wody ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.RGSN_TS) as rgsnTs ,prdt.RGSN_USER_ID ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.AMNN_TS) as amnnTs ,prdt.AMNN_USER_ID ,opertr.PRN_NM ,opertr.FUND_ID ,opertr.PROGRS_STG FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R opertr ON prdt.FUND_ID = opertr.FUND_ID
WHERE prdt.AUDIT_STG = #{auditStg}
AND prdt.FUND_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFund} || '%'
AND opertr.PRN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchPrn} || '%'
WHERE prdt.FUND_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFund} || '%'
WHERE opertr.PRN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchPrn} || '%'
AND prdt.AUDIT_STG IN('AUD01001','AUD01002','AUD01003','AUD01004','AUD01005','AUD01006') ORDER BY prdt.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT prdt.FUND_ID ,prdt.FUND_NM ,prdt.UTLINSTT_ID ,prdt.RPLY_CON ,prdt.AUDIT_STG ,opertr.PROGRS_STG ,opertr.BZN ,opertr.PRN_NM ,opertr.RPRNM ,opertr.ADRES ,opertr.INCR_YMD ,opertr.FUND_OPR_TS ,opertr.DSCPL_YN ,opertr.AST_TTSM_AMT ,opertr.LBLT_CPST_AMT ,opertr.CPTS_TTSM_AMT ,opertr.BSN_CT ,opertr.BSN_ERN ,opertr.CTNP_AMT ,opertr.AST_TTSM_AMT_1Y ,opertr.AST_TTSM_AMT_2Y ,opertr.LBLT_CPST_AMT_1Y ,opertr.LBLT_CPST_AMT_2Y ,opertr.CPTS_TTSM_AMT_1Y ,opertr.CPTS_TTSM_AMT_2Y ,opertr.BSN_ERN_1Y ,opertr.BSN_ERN_2Y ,opertr.BSN_CT_1Y ,opertr.BSN_CT_2Y ,opertr.CTNP_AMT_1Y ,opertr.CTNP_AMT_2Y ,opertr.OPRATN_SCALE_CO ,opertr.OPRATN_SCALE_AM ,opertr.BLIND_CO ,opertr.BLIND_AM ,opertr.PRJCT_CO ,opertr.PRJCT_AM ,opertr.LQD_FUND_ERNRT ,opertr.FUND_EXHS_RT ,opertr.OPRATN_HNF_INFO_TOT_CO ,opertr.OPRATN_HNF_INFO_MNGR_NM ,opertr.OPRATN_HNF_INFO_DSCPL_YN ,opertr.MANAGE_HNF_INFO_HNF ,opertr.MANAGEDTA_ATCHMNFL ,opertr.MANAGE_HNF_INFO_TOT_CO FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R opertr ON prdt.FUND_ID = #{fundId} AND opertr.FUND_ID = #{fundId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R oper SET (oper.PROGRS_STG) = (SELECT prdt.AUDIT_STG FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt WHERE prdt.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND prdt.FUND_ID = #{fundId}) WHERE oper.FUND_ID = #{fundId} AND oper.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
mapper.select: SELECT prdt.UTLINSTT_ID ,prdt.FUND_ID ,prdt.FUND_NM ,prdt.FUND_PTRN ,prdt.ORGZ_TRGPFT ,prdt.AUDIT_STG ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.WODY) as wody ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.RGSN_TS) as rgsnTs ,prdt.RGSN_USER_ID ,TO_TIMESTAMP(prdt.AMNN_TS) as amnnTs ,prdt.AMNN_USER_ID ,opertr.PRN_NM ,opertr.FUND_ID ,opertr.PROGRS_STG FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R opertr ON prdt.FUND_ID = opertr.FUND_ID AND prdt.AUDIT_STG IN('AUD01001','AUD01002','AUD01003','AUD01004','AUD01005','AUD01006') ORDER BY prdt.RGSN_TS DESC
